name: Sun-Sational Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker currns, sugar, and melted margarine. Press this mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, cornstarch, water, lemon juice, grated lemon peel, and vanilla. Mix until well blended.
4. Add one egg at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Beat in the remaining egg white. Set aside.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 325 degrees F for another 10 minutes.
7. Reduce the oven temperature to 250 degrees F. Continue baking for 30 more minutes.
8. Carefully loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and let it cool before removing the rim.
9. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch with water and lemon juice. Cook, stirring constantly, until clear and thickened.
10. Gradually add a small amount of hot mixture to slightly beaten egg yolk.
11. Return this mixture to the hot sauce and cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
12. Allow it to cool slightly before spooning over the cheesecake and refrigerating.
